items.title: Earthmoving & Rehabilitation
items.description: Bulk earthworks and site rehabilitation for projects of any scale. From initial cut and fill through to final grading and revegetation-ready surfaces.

page.intro: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving brings over 30 years of earthmoving experience to every job. Whether you need bulk excavation, site levelling, or full land rehabilitation, our team and fleet are equipped to handle it.

items.question: Do you offer wet hire or dry hire?
items.answer: We offer wet hire — machinery supplied with an experienced operator included.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: Cessnock, Maitland and the broader Upper Hunter region.

items.question: Do you offer contract rates or hourly rates?
items.answer: Both — we'll work with you on the arrangement that suits your project.

items.question: What size excavators do you have?
items.answer: We operate 4.5T, 13T and 20T excavators, so we can match the machine to the job.

cta.subheadline: Contact us for a quote on your earthmoving project.

items.title: Roads & Dams Construction
items.description: Experienced in rural road construction, dam building and water retention earthworks across the Hunter and Upper Hunter region.

page.heroSub: Reliable rural road construction and dam building — built to last in tough Australian conditions.
page.intro: From farm access tracks to larger rural road networks and water storage dams, Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has the fleet and expertise to get the job done right.

items.question: Can you build dams for irrigation or stock water?
items.answer: Yes — we construct dams for agricultural water storage, irrigation and stock water purposes.

items.question: Do you handle rural road drainage?
items.answer: Absolutely — drainage is a key part of any road construction and we plan for it from the start.

items.question: What machinery do you use for road construction?
items.answer: Typically the grader, dozer, smooth drum roller, tipper trucks and water cart — matched to the project requirements.

items.answer: Yes — we can windrow material for burning or arrange removal depending on your requirements.

about.headline: About Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
about.body:
Mitchell Bros Earthmoving is a family owned and operated business that has been getting the job done across Cessnock, Maitland and the Upper Hunter for over 30 years. We service the agricultural, commercial, construction, industrial, mining and residential industries — bringing the right machine and the right operator to every project.

Our machinery fleet is available for wet hire Monday to Friday, year-round. We work on both contract and hourly rates, and you'll always be dealing with a professional, experienced team. Rod and Kevin are available directly — give them a call.

highlights.text: Family owned and operated — locally based in Cessnock
Full fleet available Monday to Friday, year-round

aboutPage.heroSub: 30+ years of earthmoving experience. Family owned, locally operated, Cessnock-based.

mission.headline: Our Commitment
mission.text: To deliver professional, reliable earthmoving services with the right machinery and the right people — every time. As a family business, our reputation in the Hunter region means everything to us.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been a trusted name in the Hunter region for over 30 years. As a family owned and operated business based in Cessnock, we've built our reputation job by job — through reliability, professionalism and getting results.

Over the decades we've grown our fleet to cover everything from small residential excavations to large-scale commercial, agricultural and mining earthworks. Our operators are experienced, our machinery is maintained, and our rates are fair.
We service the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions and are available Monday to Friday, year-round, on both contract and hourly arrangements.

items.description: We're a family business and we treat clients like one. You'll deal directly with Rod or Kevin — no middlemen.
